title: CompiledScript Debug prints full parsed script tree
description: CompiledScript's Debug impl delegates to the Arc<Script> field, which prints the full parsed form tree. For a large script this produces megabytes of output, which will surprise callers who use {:?} in log lines or test assertions. The regex_cache is correctly summarised as '<N compiled patterns>' but the script field is unlimited. The Debug impl should also summarise the script (e.g., '<N statements>') or use a custom format to prevent accidental log flooding.
